nodes.name: If message not in data table
(Pending or Skipped) Append rows to table

parameters.jsCode:
const errJson = $('Is Prompt error').item.json;
const errOut = errJson?.output ?? {};

const shouldFollowUp = errJson.shouldFollowUp ?? errOut.shouldFollowUp;
const status = shouldFollowUp ? "pending" : "skipped";

return {
  messageId: $('Start').item.json.id,
  conversationId: $('Start').item.json.conversationId,
  subject: $('Start').item.json.subject,
  recipient: $('Start').item.json.toRecipients[0].emailAddress.address,
  sender: $('Start').item.json.sender_emailAddress_address,
  sentTime: $('Start').item.json.sentDateTime,
  originalSentTime: $('Start').item.json.sentDateTime,
  status,
  shouldFollowUp,
  followUpMessage: $('if old status is unprompted1').item.json.storedMessage,
  nextFollowUpAt: $('Get Followup time').item.json.nextFollowUpAt ?? $('Get Followup time').item.json.output.nextFollowUpAt,
  urgency: errJson.urgency ?? errOut.urgency,
  relationship: errJson.relationship ?? errOut.relationship,
  nature: errJson.nature ?? errOut.nature,
  timeSensitivity: errJson.timeSensitivity ?? errOut.timeSensitivity,
  recommendedDelayInHours: errJson.recommendedDelayInHours ?? errOut.recommendedDelayInHours,
  reason: errJson.reason ?? errOut.reason,
  followUpCount: 0
};

main.node: If message not in data table
(Pending or Skipped) Append rows to table
